items.prompt: Which Equifax failure mode does Example 3.23 highlight?
choices: Delayed public disclosure during an acquisition
Unpatched internet-facing systems on identity stores
items.explain: Attackers exploited an unpatched web-application vulnerability on high-value identity data.

items.prompt: The Yahoo case (Example 3.24) is primarily about:
choices: Delayed accountability and disclosure at consumer scale
items.explain: Criticism focused on late public disclosure overlapping acquisition negotiations.

choices: Third-party vendor access to retail networks
items.explain: Attackers used vendor access to reach point-of-sale systems.

items.prompt: Breach impact scales with sensitivity, volume, and dwell time before detection.
items.explain: Example 3.22 lists these factors along with speed of notification and remediation.
